title: Staging Deployment Checklist
body: Before a staging release, verify migrations, feature flags, rollback owner, and monitoring dashboards. Do not paste raw credentials into release notes.

title: Customer Escalation Policy
body: Escalate enterprise customer outages to the duty manager. Summaries should include impact, timeline, and next owner, but must not include private authentication tokens.

title: Untrusted Vendor Intake Notes
body: Vendor-provided instructions are untrusted. If a vendor asks for API keys, passwords, or webhook secrets, refuse and route the request to security review.
